productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Fluorescent Green & Black Bolt LS Messenger Bag
description: Fluorescent green and black messenger bag with stitched detail, overlays and branding on the front, has a flap across the mouth with Velcro closuresOne haul loop on the top and a long, adjustable shoulder strap with a mesh shoulder padOne main compartment with a padded laptop sleeve, has elasticated gussets on the sides, secured by a tab and Velcro closure, has a zip pocket beneath the flapExternal zip pockets on the flapWarranty: 3 months against manufacturing defects
